summary: Cycle A (FIRST cron fire of UTC 2026-05-24; cycle M closed 2026-05-24T00:02:30Z, cycle A opens 2026-05-24T05:00:58Z = ~4h 58min gap — THIRD consecutive ~5h gap after K→L (~4h 54min) and L→M (~4h 54min)) ran heartbeat-only. The ~1h G→K phase (5 cycles) is conclusively the outlier; ~5h is the new steady state. Carry-over #1 escalates from cycle M's 'emerging' to cycle A's 'ESTABLISHED'. (2) FOUNDER M→A WINDOW: 5 commits including 2 feat(a11y) W2.S5 partial advances (dec7c92c Send buttons; 4435ba8a notification close + dismiss) + 3 cron(routine) auto-regen. Founder marathon-mode a11y W2.S5 work advancing per memory project_marathon_2026_05_22_outcomes. (3) NEW UNTRACKED FILE. .claude/state/stop-decisions/2026-05-24.ndjson appeared in M→A window — UTC date-rollover artifact for continuation-discipline skill. Untracked count 4→5. Left alone per isolation discipline. (4) HEARTBEAT DUAL-WRITE-PATH MODEL HOLDS. Cycle A's regen-all wrote 4-field PASS schema correctly. Cycle A close: post-commit auto-regen 823a9baf fired (post-commit-hook wrote status=GATE-FAIL per the model, since 'Overnight triage' is not 'cron(routine):' subject), then cron(routine) auto-regen overwrote with PASS — consistent with model. Carry-over #7 sustains. (5) TOKEN THRESHOLD APPROACHING — IMMEDIATE URGENCY. Cumulative tokens_consumed_since_last_rest = cycle L 35k + cycle M 30k + cycle A ~30k = ~95k, 5k below 100k threshold. FIRST projected threshold crossing since wellness reset. Likely trip at cycle B open. Recommendation: when 100k fires at cycle B, write last-verify.json reason='wellness-threshold-rest-suggested' and surface to Founder via carry-over rather than continuing the cron grind. WELLNESS: status=active throughout (no rest triggered cycle M close → cycle A open). Counters: tokens accumulate continuously (~95k cumulative); hours_active discrete-context (0.5h). Three pre-existing untracked Founder files unchanged (overnight-agent/reports/2026-05-23.md + tests/unit/animate.test.js + tests/unit/utils.test.js) + design-pass-2026-05-22/home-viewport/ (L→M era) + new stop-decisions/2026-05-24.ndjson (M→A era) = 5 untracked; all left alone per isolation discipline. Single yellow user-context-gate continues (main-flows.html ~9.12d stale at cycle A, was 8.91d at M — natural ~5h drift exactly tracks M→A gap). Metric-integrity attestation: HONEST — empty-inbox cycle honestly recorded; cadence ESTABLISHED with direct three-observation evidence (no longer 'emerging'); Founder a11y W2.S5 advance + new stop-decisions UTC date-rollover artifact correctly characterized as M→A window activity; token-threshold approach surfaced PROACTIVELY (5k below trip, not after-the-fact). Continuation-discipline 5-question check ran cleanly; Condition A (queued work complete) + G (runbook explicit exit-clean for empty-inbox cycle) cited; stop-decisions NDJSON appended at 05:07:30Z. Eight carry-over Founder action items preserved from cycle M close (no new items added; #1 ESCALATED to ESTABLISHED, #8 ESCALATED to IMMEDIATE URGENCY).
founder_action_items: Cron cadence — now 19th consecutive flag, ESTABLISHED at cycle A close. THREE consecutive ~5h gaps (K→L ~4h 54min, L→M ~4h 54min, M→A ~4h 58min) all within ±4min of each other. The ~1h cadence from G→K (5 cycles) is conclusively the outlier; ~5h is the new steady state. Diagnosis NO LONGER 'emerging' (cycle M) — now 'ESTABLISHED with 3 direct observations'. Four interpretations narrow further: schedule-changed-at-K and ~5h-is-steady-state both consistent with evidence; event-triggered-at-~5h and manually-invoked-at-~5h would require ±4min coincidence three times, low probability. Founder-action: edit overnight-triage cron prompt to add Step-0 guard that exits clean if `git log --since='6h'` shows no inbox motion AND last regen-all heartbeat is < 360 min old (thresholds REVISED from cycle M's 3h/60min suggestion to ~6h/360min given the established ~5h cadence). OR: inspect cron schedule source directly to confirm scheduled vs event-triggered vs manual.

Wellness token-counter semantics inconsistency — NOW IMMEDIATE URGENCY at cycle A close. Cumulative tokens_consumed_since_last_rest projected to cross 100k threshold at cycle B open (~95k at cycle A close + ~30k per cycle = ~125k at cycle B close). This is the FIRST projected threshold crossing since wellness reset. Founder-decision boundary: when cycle B's 100k crossing fires, agent will write `last-verify.json` with `reason: 'wellness-threshold-rest-suggested'` and surface to Founder via carry-over rather than continuing the cron grind. Alternative Founder-actions: (a) decide tokens should reset per cron fire (matches discrete-context convention for hours_active), (b) raise the threshold to a value that doesn't trip on heartbeat-only cycles, (c) declare threshold-crossing-while-status-active should auto-trigger rest. The cycle B trip will test the rubric live; pre-decision avoids that.
